messages.content: what is the name of the series according to the description: the distant future, people have settled in the solar system and are mining resources in the belts of planets, and the main characters are just the crew of the mining ship? There are people living on the belts there and they are kind of called "belt" or something like that
The name of the series is "The Expanse".
Thank you
You're welcome.
And can you remember a 3-d cartoon where aliens in huge exoskeletons attack humanity, drive them into bunkers, and many years later a person finds one of them and fights against aliens.

Yes, the 3D cartoon you are referring to is probably the "Battle for Terra", released in 2007. It is a science fiction animated film in which the inhabitants of the peaceful planet of Terra, who live in harmony with nature, are invaded by the warlike alien race of the Mala. The humans of Terra are forced to flee underground, and years later a young human pilot named Jim Stanton befriends a female Mala named Mala and works to end the war between the two species.
No, friend, try again

I'm sorry about that. The 3D cartoon you are referring to is likely "Darwin's Game." It's a Japanese animated series where a high school student named Kaname Sudo is invited to play a mobile game called Darwin's Game, which involves players using special powers to fight and survive against each other. Kaname soon finds himself dragged into the deadly world of the game, where he must face off against other players and giant exoskeleton-wearing creatures known as Sigils.
No, friend, this is definitely not an anime. Try again

I apologize for the confusion earlier. The 3D cartoon you are describing is most likely "Skyland" which first aired in 2005. It is set in the 23rd century and follows the story of siblings, Mahad and Lena, who live in a world where the planet has been shattered into a ring of floating continents. An evil dictator, known as the Sphere, rules over this world and sends his armies of Exo-fighters to attack the Skyland cities. Mahad and Lena's parents were captured by the Sphere, so they set out to find and rescue them while fighting against the Sphere's forces. The Exo-fighters are exo-suits worn by the soldiers controlled by the Sphere.

Thank you for the additional information. The 3D cartoon you are referring to may be "Megas XLR." The show follows the story of Coop, a mechanic who discovers a giant mecha robot from the future and modifies it into his own personal vehicle in a car-based customization (hence the title MEGAS XLR). The story follows Coop as he fights off alien threats with his mech, often with the assistance of his two friends, Jamie and Kiva, throughout the series. I hope this helps!
